baselines.name: no_convergence
baselines.description: Zero delta — persona has no multi-turn effect

notes: EXPLORATORY — not pre-registered. Executed post-hoc at reduced scale (designed n=100, actual n=7) due to budget constraints. Result statistically underpowered — not interpretable at this sample size. 7 conversation sequences, 5 turns each. Wilcoxon p=0.1094. Total cost: $2.57.
data_filter: 5-turn sequences with persistent agent state per persona mode.
